Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Initial commit: Bloom & Petal Interactive Bouquet Builder

Implemented a high-end, single-file interactive bouquet builder with:
- Virtual vase with animated flower display
- Live pricing engine (base $15, standard flowers $2, premium $5)
- Complimentary silk ribbon for orders over $40
- Gift message with live preview on styled gift card
- Boutique branding with soft pinks, deep greens, and gold accents
- Validation for empty vase checkout
- Tailwind CSS and Lucide Icons via CDN
- Vanilla JavaScript with elegant animations

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
